notes: The record resolves to the same 4747 Bethesda Avenue restaurant as aventino-bethesda, whose current canonical menu has 52 formulations.
All 19 frozen rows reconcile exactly once: 15 exact, one normalized, one stale product, and two non-product artifacts.
Five frozen allergen or provenance outcomes conflict with the current owner ingredients and partial restaurant-linked affirmative labels; two rows are accurately unavailable.
The linked ordering surface is not a complete restaurant-issued allergen matrix and omitted labels are not negative evidence.
This OSM-derived record duplicates the canonical Aventino record rather than representing another location.
Its frozen output also includes a membership/navigation row and a press link as products.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the same current restaurant-issued menu artifact used for the canonical Aventino record.
Captured the official identity and Toast-linkage page for the same Bethesda address.
Terra, Sol, and coordinator web review accessed the same linked ordering menu; coordinator artifact capture returned HTTP 403.
notes: The page identifies 4747 Bethesda Avenue and supplies partial affirmative labels.

evidence.excerpt: The live ordering page identifies Aventino Cucina at 4747 Bethesda Avenue and gives partial affirmative allergen labels for selected current products.

request.result: Coordinator artifact capture returned HTTP 403; Terra, Sol, and coordinator web retrieval accessed the live restaurant-linked page.

notes: Restaurant-linked partial affirmative evidence; not a complete matrix.

findings.summary: This OSM record is a duplicate of aventino-bethesda at the same address and on the same owner and ordering sources.
One stale product and two navigation or press artifacts are represented as food rows in the duplicate record.
Five matched rows require allergen or provenance correction before the duplicate can be terminally reconciled.

repairs.summary: Remove the duplicate from the generated repository, map every frozen row to the canonical Aventino audit, and retain this dossier as the duplicate-disposition record.

notes: Terra low and Sol medium both routed this record to coordinator review; the coordinator established duplicate identity and full frozen-row reconciliation.
